topic: Defining Vehicle Routes and Pick-up Points
summary: This topic details how to create and manage vehicle routes within the ERP system. It includes assigning vehicles to routes, defining multiple pick-up/drop points, setting timings, specifying charges, and optionally skipping transport fees for certain installments.
steps: To create a new route: Click 'New Vehicle Route'.
Select the 'Vehicle' that will operate on this route from the dropdown list.
Optionally, select 'Skip Installment' if transport fees should not be charged for specific fee installments (e.g., June). Multiple months can be selected.
Optionally, select 'Employee' (driver) assigned to this route. This data comes from the HRM employee setup.

To add pick-up points: Enter 'Pick-up Point Name' (e.g., Ansal), 'Pick-up Time' (e.g., 6:00 AM), 'Drop Time' (e.g., 4:00 PM), and 'Amount' (e.g., 2000). Optionally, enter 'Longitude' and 'Latitude'. Click 'Add' to save the pick-up point. Repeat for additional points.
Click 'Add' to save the complete vehicle route.
To update an existing route: Select the route, click 'Edit', modify details, and click 'Update'.

To upload pick-up points in bulk: Click 'Upload Pick-up Point', download the 'Sample Excel', fill in the data (Pick-up Point Name, Amount, Pick-up Time, Drop Time, Longitude, Latitude), choose the file, and click 'Submit'.
business_rules: Transport is session-dependent; routes may need to be re-established or copied for new sessions.
The 'Skip Installment' feature prevents transport fees from being charged for selected installments.
Employee data for drivers must be pre-configured in the HRM module.
When manually adding pick-up points, Pick-up Time and Drop Time are mandatory. When using Excel upload, they are non-mandatory.
important_notes: Existing vehicle routes can be copied from a previous session using the 'Copy from Session' feature.
Longitude and Latitude fields are primarily used for integration with GPS tracking systems.
Bulk upload of pick-up points via Excel can generate an error file if data is invalid or incomplete (e.g., missing mandatory fields).
questions: How do I define a new transport route in the ERP system?
Can I assign multiple pick-up points to a single vehicle route?
What is the purpose of the 'Skip Installment' option in vehicle route setup?
How can I bulk upload pick-up points for a transport route?
Where do I assign a driver to a specific bus route?
